Welcome to IQRA Token

Transforming Education with Blockchain

IQRA Token is a cutting-edge BEP-20 token built on the Binance Smart Chain, dedicated to revolutionizing education on a global scale. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, IQRA Token offers a wide range of use cases aimed at enhancing the educational experience for learners and educators.

Audit + KYC finished!

Check Rewards
buy now

The Iqranos are here!

The Iqranos is a NFT collection of 10,000 digital avatars that merges the appeal of unique digital art with rewarding opportunities for its holders.

Each Iqrano NFT also comes with exclusive access to rewards from IslamicCoin staking.

MINT

Use Cases

1. Payment for Educational Resources

IQRA Token serves as a secure and efficient means of payment for a variety of educational resources, including digital books, online courses, and educational materials. With IQRA Token, users can easily purchase access to high-quality educational content from a diverse range of providers, ensuring a seamless learning experience.

2. Rewards for Educators and Learners

We believe in rewarding excellence in education. Educators and content creators can earn IQRA Tokens for producing and sharing quality educational content on our platform. Similarly, learners are incentivized to engage with courses and materials by earning tokens upon completion, encouraging active participation and continuous learning.

3. Scholarships and Grants

IQRA Token is committed to promoting accessibility and inclusivity in education. Through our platform, we facilitate the funding of scholarships and grants for deserving learners, empowering individuals from diverse backgrounds to pursue their educational aspirations and unlock their full potential.

4. Educational Events

IQRA Token can be used to purchase tickets for educational workshops, conferences, and events. By integrating IQRA Token into event ticketing systems, we facilitate seamless transactions and enable individuals to participate in valuable learning opportunities that enrich their educational journey.

5. Gamification

We leverage gamification techniques to enhance the learning experience and promote engagement. IQRA Token can be integrated into educational games, quizzes, and interactive activities, adding an element of fun and interactivity while incentivizing users to achieve educational milestones and goals.

Roadmap: Striving for Excellence

At IQRA Token, we refrain from making promises, but pledge our utmost dedication to achieving significant milestones. Our commitment lies in diligently working towards realizing our goals and making a meaningful impact in the field of education.

Phase 1: Foundation (Q2-Q3 '24)
- Token Fairlaunch
- Create Website
- Community Building (establish social media presence)
- Introducing MindSafe
- Contract Update
- Contract Audit
- Create Discord channel
Phase 2: Growth (Q3-Q4 '24)
- Launch IQRA NFT Collection with rewards system
- Listing CMC/CoinGecko
- Partnerships with other projects
- Building Team (dev)
Phase 3: Expansion (2025)
- Ecosystem Development
- Educational Game Development
- Listing CEX

Meet the IQRA Token Team: Dedicated to Transforming Education

AbuBabu

our passionate team leader, drives IQRA Token’s mission to democratize education through blockchain technology. His commitment to innovation and educational accessibility inspires our team to revolutionize learning globally. Join us in AbuBabu’s vision for a brighter, more inclusive educational future.

How to buy:

Set up a Wallet

Ensure you have a compatible cryptocurrency wallet that supports BEP-20 tokens like IQRA. Popular options include MetaMask, Trust Wallet.

Get BNB

Purchase Binance Coin (BNB) from a cryptocurrency exchange like Binance, Coinbase, or Kraken. You'll need BNB to swap for IQRA tokens.

Connect Wallet to a Decentralized Exchange (DEX)

Use your wallet to connect to a decentralized exchange that supports IQRA tokens. PancakeSwap is a popular DEX on the Binance Smart Chain where you can trade BNB for IQRA.

Swap BNB for IQRA

On the DEX, navigate to the IQRA trading pair (BNB/IQRA). Enter the amount of BNB you want to swap for IQRA and confirm the transaction. Make sure to review and confirm the transaction details before proceeding.

Receive IQRA Tokens

Once the transaction is confirmed, the IQRA tokens will be transferred to your connected wallet. You can now view your IQRA token balance in your wallet.

Store Safely

Transfer your IQRA tokens to a secure wallet for safekeeping. Remember to keep your private keys and recovery phrases confidential to protect your assets.

Go to PanCakeSwap
